videos.title: I Drove America's Most Brutal Pioneer Trail
videos.description:
In 1879, more than 250 pioneers were asked to do something close to impossible: leave everything behind and build a wagon road through a thousand-mile cliff. They said yes.
Nearly 150 years later, I took the Jeep and trailer down the Hole in the Rock trail outside Escalante, Utah, to retrace part of that route myself. What starts as graded gravel turns into washboard, slickrock, and shelf roads the deeper you go and that was the easy version. The pioneers had no road at all. They built it as the

videos.title: Are these tires big enough?! - Crazy find for the Deuce
videos.description: Welcome back to the family farm in Tennessee! In this farm update, we process our organic beef, check in on the meat chickens, install a drive-through electric gate, and perform a massive military truck upgrade that's already proving its worth around the property. We also take down the old orchard and clean up dead cedar trees using the handy Woodland Mills TF810 Pro Wood Chipper, turning the debris into useful wood chips. We also enjoy the fruits of our labor over the holidays with family as ou

videos.title: AI: Build Cars, Not Faster Horses
videos.description:
Stop building faster horses! 🐎

Executives often think AI is just about speeding up old processes. But what if you could innovate instead?

Dona Sarkar challenges the mindset of merely cutting costs. Embrace AI to solve new problems and lead your industry!

Are you ready to reinvent your business?

#AI #Innovation #Leadership

videos.title: Amplifying Greatness with AI
videos.description:
Can AI make you 30x more valuable?

If you're already amazing at your job, AI can amplify your skills exponentially! But what happens when someone less skilled uses AI to outshine you? Discover why understanding AI is crucial for everyone, even the best of the best.

Don't let others outpace you—invest in AI and stay ahead!

#AI #CareerGrowth #SkillAmplification

videos.title: The Annual AI Slowdown Panic Is Here
videos.description:
DataCurve's DeepSWE benchmark exposes large performance gaps on realistic, long-horizon coding tasks. Summer AI slowdown panic returns alongside renewed debate over job displacement and deployment frictions. Token shortages and massive inference funding for Base10 and OpenRouter push the market toward pay-per-use pricing and constrain agent experimentation and equitable access.

videos.title: I Built a Social Media Carousel Generator With Claude Code
videos.description:
Grab this system today: https://skool.com/scrapes

Most AI-generated carousels are just AI slop. They lack brand continuity, have no visual hierarchy, and fail to engage. In this video, I reveal the system I built to solve this. I'll show you how to go from a simple topic or blog post to a fully polished, on-brand carousel that feels authentic to your brand. We'll look at the system running live and break down the core concepts that make it work, so you can build your own.

Watch the full video
